case_title: NORTHER CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE INC. VS. FIRESCOPE, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ATTORNEY FEES PURSUANT TO CC 1717.5 (TRANSACTION ID # 100040036) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHER CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE INC.
DECLARATION CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 100040036) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHER CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE INC.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHER CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FIRESCOPE, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHER CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIRESCOPE, INC. $10,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,039.96 INTEREST, $553.62 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,293.58, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHER CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FIRESCOPE, INC. DOES 1 TO 40 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-24-2018

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100065132) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHER CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FIRESCOPE, INC.
